accept: act ready human output surfaces assignee and claimed_at for claimed issues
either default-on for these columns or selectable via --columns
payload.description: act ready does not surface who has what claimed or when. For solo use this is fine; for multi-agent setups it is near-essential — the whole point of ready is to coordinate, and claim ownership is a coordination signal. Add assignee and claimed_at columns; either default-on or configurable via --columns. Source: docs/aac-website-dogfood-debrief.md §7.
payload.title: cli: act ready shows assignee and claimed_at columns
